name: Valentine's Day Marble Heart Taper Candle Holder - Threshold™
description:
Infuse seasonal warmth to your home decor with this Valentine's Day Marble Heart Taper Candle Holder from Threshold™. This candle holder is designed in the shape of a tilted heart with a holder at the top and footed base. Made of marble in a white hue, this candle holder is compatible with a variety of taper candles that cast a warm, soft glow.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
